title: Kate Robb Doghouse
description: Doghouse is traditional standup with a few twists which bring the show to life. “Marriage, motherhood & a dog with sticks where they shouldn’t be — this is family life as it really is: messy, honest & brilliantly funny" Ian Whitcombe Comedy. What previous audience members have said: “My face hurt from laughing by the end” “Proper belly laughing from start to finish!” "Such a clever performer and so, so funny" "Absolutely fantastic set from start to finish. Still chuckling..." “Awesome - one to watch in my opinion, clever writing with a naughty edge at times - great performer too” Kate was a Funny Women Awards semi-finalist just months after starting standup & is a regular on the UK comedy circuit, performing at venues up & down the country. She has been described as: “Talented & going places” Notts Comedy Review; “Sharp, sarcastic, brilliantly bold” Ian Whitcombe Comedy; “A star in the making” Den of Laughs; "Definitely one to watch" Gag n Bone Man Comedy.
